title: allophylus excelsus
intro: Allophylus excelsus, also known as the giant allophyllus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Allophylus excelsus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
